landing.title:
Africa's voice,
training tomorrow's AI.
landing.subtitle: Contribute in 2 minutes. Read a sentence in Ewe, record your voice. You're building Africa's AI infrastructure.

how.title: How it works
how.step1Desc: We give you a sentence in Ewe. You read it out loud.
how.step2Desc: Press the button. Your mic captures your voice. That's it.
how.step3Desc: Your voice joins the dataset. African AI learns.

markets.label: OUR IMPACT ZONE
markets.title: We start in Togo.
markets.subtitle: Every African language deserves to be heard by AI. We start with Ewe. The rest belongs to the continent.

validate.title: Validate recordings
validate.instruction: Listen and tell us if the sentence is well pronounced

explore.title: Explore the dataset
explore.downloadDesc: Full dataset of approved recordings — free to use (CC-BY)

brandShowcase.description: Corafric is a community open-source project building free voice datasets to integrate our African languages into the artificial intelligence infrastructure.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content: This platform is managed in a transparent and community-driven way. All recorded and approved voice data are shared under the open CC-BY license for the public good. We do not collect any sensitive personal data without your consent. Audio recordings are anonymized and do not contain public names or personal identifiers.

cookies.title: Cookies Policy
cookies.content: Corafric uses only essential technical cookies to manage your session (for example to keep you signed in or for data validation needs). We do not use any tracking cookies or commercial profiling tools.

hero.title:
African languages
deserve to exist
in AI.
hero.subtitle: Corafric is an open community project. It grows thanks to people like you — developers, researchers, organizations, enthusiasts.

card1.title: Do you speak Ewe or a local language?
card1.desc: The most valuable contribution. Each recorded sentence is a fragment of linguistic memory preserved for future generations.

card2.title: Are you a developer?
card2.desc: Corafric is open source. Backend, frontend, audio pipeline, validation models — there is room for all specialties.

card3.title: Do you believe in this project?
card3.desc: Spread the word about Corafric — in your university, your network, your community. Visibility is a form of real contribution.

manifesto.title:
"The world's most powerful AI models
don't understand Ewe. Nor Dioula. Nor Fon."
manifesto.body: Corafric will not solve this problem alone. But it lays the first stone: data, collected by the communities themselves, for tools that look like them.

partnership.title: Do you represent an organization?
partnership.body: Universities, NGOs, cultural institutions, tech companies — contact us to discuss a formal partnership.
